sentences.target: Die Veranstaltung ist heute im Park.

translations.de: Die Veranstaltung ist heute im Park.
translations.en: The event is today in the park.
translations.es: El evento es hoy en el parque.
translations.fr: L’événement a lieu aujourd’hui au parc.
translations.pt: O evento acontece hoje no parque.
translations.vi: Sự kiện diễn ra hôm nay ở công viên.
translations.nl: Het evenement is vandaag in het park.
translations.hu: Az esemény ma a parkban lesz.
translations.el: Η εκδήλωση είναι σήμερα στο πάρκο.
translations.nb: Arrangementet er i parken i dag.
translations.id: Acara berlangsung hari ini di taman.
translations.ro: Evenimentul are loc astăzi în parc.
translations.da: Arrangementet er i parken i dag.
translations.ja: イベントは今日、公園で行われます。

tokens.explanation: Definite article marking feminine nominative singular; determiner of 'Veranstaltung'.
Common noun meaning 'event'; subject in nominative singular feminine.
Finite present (3rd sg) copula linking the subject to a locative predicate.
Temporal adverb modifying the clause.
Contraction of 'in dem'; preposition introducing a dative prepositional phrase.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'im'; masculine dative singular.

sentences.target: Wir brauchen Tickets für die Veranstaltung.

translations.de: Wir brauchen Tickets für die Veranstaltung.
translations.en: We need tickets for the event.
translations.fr: Nous avons besoin de billets pour l’événement.
translations.pt: Precisamos de ingressos para o evento.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi cần vé cho sự kiện.
translations.nl: We hebben kaartjes nodig voor het evenement.
translations.hi: हमें कार्यक्रम के लिए टिकट चाहिए।
translations.id: Kami perlu tiket untuk acara itu.
translations.ro: Avem nevoie de bilete pentru eveniment.
translations.da: Vi har brug for billetter til arrangementet.
translations.ja: イベントのチケットが必要です。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural nominative; subject.
Finite present (1st pl) main verb meaning 'to need'.
Plural common noun; direct accusative object of 'brauchen'.
Preposition meaning 'for', governing accusative.
Definite article, accusative feminine singular; determiner of 'Veranstaltung'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'für' in accusative.

sentences.target: Ich gehe nach der Veranstaltung noch einkaufen.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈɡeːə naːx deːɐ̯ fɛɐ̯ˈʔanʃtaltʊŋ nɔx ˈaɪ̯nˌkaʊ̯fən/

translations.de: Ich gehe nach der Veranstaltung noch einkaufen.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈɡeːə naːx deːɐ̯ fɛɐ̯ˈʔanʃtaltʊŋ nɔx ˈaɪ̯nˌkaʊ̯fən/
translations.en: I’m going shopping after the event.
translations.es: Voy de compras después del evento.
translations.fr: Je vais faire des courses après l’événement.
translations.it: Vado a fare la spesa dopo l’evento.
translations.ko: 행사가 끝나고 장 보러 갈 거예요.
translations.zh-Hans: 活动结束后我还要去买东西。
translations.yue: 活動完咗之後我仲要去買嘢。
translations.ru: После мероприятия я пойду за покупками.
translations.pt: Vou fazer compras depois do evento.
translations.vi: Sau sự kiện, tôi sẽ đi mua sắm.
translations.nl: Na het evenement ga ik nog boodschappen doen.
translations.uk: Після заходу я піду ще за покупками.
translations.hu: A rendezvény után még elmegyek bevásárolni.
translations.hi: कार्यक्रम के बाद मैं खरीदारी करने जाऊँगा।
translations.pl: Po wydarzeniu pójdę jeszcze na zakupy.
translations.el: Μετά την εκδήλωση θα πάω για ψώνια.
translations.id: Setelah acara, saya akan pergi belanja.
translations.sv: Efter evenemanget ska jag gå och handla.
translations.ro: După eveniment mai merg la cumpărături.
translations.da: Efter arrangementet skal jeg ud at handle.
translations.ja: イベントのあとに買い物に行きます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject.
Finite present (1st sg) of 'gehen'; used with bare infinitive 'einkaufen' in a light-verb construction ('go shopping').
Preposition meaning 'after' in temporal use, governing dative.
Definite article, dative feminine singular; determiner of 'Veranstaltung'.
Common noun; object of 'nach' in dative.
Adverb meaning 'still/also/then'; here adds an additional/temporal nuance ('also/then still').
Infinitive of the separable verb 'ein+kaufen' meaning 'to shop'; not split here; complements 'gehe'.

sentences.target: Tom hilft bei der Veranstaltung im Rathaus.
sentences.reading: /tɔm hɪlft baɪ̯ deːɐ̯ fɛɐ̯ˈʔanʃtaltʊŋ ɪm ˈʁaːtˌhaʊ̯s/

translations.de: Tom hilft bei der Veranstaltung im Rathaus.
translations.ipa: /tɔm hɪlft baɪ̯ deːɐ̯ fɛɐ̯ˈʔanʃtaltʊŋ ɪm ˈʁaːtˌhaʊ̯s/
translations.en: Tom is helping at the event in the town hall.
translations.es: Tom está ayudando en el evento del ayuntamiento.
translations.fr: Tom aide lors de l’événement à l’hôtel de ville.
translations.it: Tom sta aiutando all’evento in municipio.
translations.ko: 톰은 시청에서 열리는 행사에서 도와주고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 汤姆在市政厅的活动上帮忙。
translations.yue: Tom喺市政廳嘅活動度幫手。
translations.ru: Том помогает на мероприятии в ратуше.
translations.pt: Tom está ajudando no evento na prefeitura.
translations.tr: Tom belediye binasındaki etkinlikte yardımcı oluyor.
translations.vi: Tom đang phụ giúp tại sự kiện ở tòa thị chính.
translations.ar: توم يساعد في الفعالية في مبنى البلدية.
translations.nl: Tom helpt bij het evenement in het stadhuis.
translations.uk: Том допомагає на заході в ратуші.
translations.hu: Tom a városházán tartott rendezvényen segít.
translations.hi: टॉम टाउन हॉल में होने वाले कार्यक्रम में मदद कर रहा है.
translations.pl: Tom pomaga na wydarzeniu w ratuszu.
translations.el: Ο Τομ βοηθά στην εκδήλωση στο δημαρχείο.
translations.nb: Tom hjelper til på arrangementet i rådhuset.
translations.id: Tom membantu di acara di balai kota.
translations.sv: Tom hjälper till på evenemanget i stadshuset.
translations.ro: Tom ajută la evenimentul de la primărie.
translations.cs: Tom pomáhá na akci na radnici.
translations.da: Tom hjælper til ved arrangementet på rådhuset.
translations.ja: トムは市役所のイベントで手伝っています。

tokens.explanation: Proper name; subject in nominative singular.
Finite present (3rd sg) main verb meaning 'to help'; commonly used with 'bei' + dative.
Preposition meaning 'at/with', governing dative.
Definite article, dative feminine singular; determiner of 'Veranstaltung'.
Common noun; object of 'bei' in dative.
Contraction of 'in dem'; preposition introducing a locative phrase.
Common noun meaning 'town hall/city hall'; object of the preposition 'im'; neuter dative singular.
